item.description: Hilary Bublitz signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Community Association Legislative Action Committee.

item.description: David Forte signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of the Insurance Commissioner.

item.description: Steve Horvath signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent HOA United.

item.description: Brandon Houskeeper signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent American Wood Council. They are a registered lobbyist.
